Description: Platinum Drywall Tools Inside Corner Roller The Platinum Drywall Tools Inside Corner Roller is precision designed for embedding paper tape into inside 90 degree corners. Immediately after applying the mud and tape into the corner, you will use this tool by rolling it over the tape. This process forces the excess joint compound out from under the tape and properly beds the corner. As a result, it creates a beautiful sharp inside corner. Use a corner flusher or angle head, immediately after rolling to clean up the excess compound. (sold separately)
